releases.name: Walking demo
releases.scope: All 11 modules navigable, full BYO-key live integration, install-as-PWA verified, deployed to both GitHub Pages and AWS S3

sprints.name: Foundation + design system
tasks: T-01: Project scaffold (Vite, React, TS, Tailwind, PWA plugin) — DONE
T-03: App shell (header, mobile bottom nav, content frame, route boundary)
T-04: State module (versioned localStorage, progress, key, model prefs)
T-05: Anthropic client (direct-browser call, error mapping)
T-06: SVG icon set + PWA icons (192/512/maskable) + favicon

sprints.name: Curriculum + exercise engine
tasks: T-07: Curriculum data fixture (11 modules, banking scenarios, vocabulary, exercises, simulated fallbacks, leadership talking points)
T-08: Module page (overview, vocabulary, exercise runner, self-check, mark-complete)
T-09: Exercise runner (model select, temperature/max_tokens, system+user editor, live run, simulated run)
T-10: Settings (key management, model defaults, reset)
T-11: Progress view (per-module status, overall completion)
T-12: Leadership export (consolidate notes + responses into Markdown brief, download)

sprints.name: Verification + ship
tasks: T-13: Vitest unit tests (curriculum invariants, state, anthropic-client URL/headers)
T-14: Build + preview locally; manifest + SW verified
T-16: Push to github.com/1seansean1/helm + enable Pages
T-17: Deploy to AWS commercial S3 static-site bucket
T-18: Smoke test both URLs; record deploy receipt
